subcodes.first_line: O handmaid of Bahá! Thy letter was received. Praise be to God, from the rose-garden of inner meanings wafted a sweet fragrance of the love of God [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یا امه البهاء نامه شما رسید الحمد لله از گلشن معانی نفحه طیبه محبت الله
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for the spiritual progress of others, @divine grace, bounty, confirmations; spiritual capacity, @equality of men and women, @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @firmness in the Covenant
